title: Your news of the week
intro: My dear friends, three stories worth your time.

teases.title: What the budget means for our community
teases.hook: Three numbers that should change how we organise this autumn.

teases.title: A new kind of housing co-op
teases.hook: Brothers in Manchester have done something quite extraordinary.

teases.title: Joseph Beam, forty years on
teases.hook: Why his words still cut through everything else this week.

tickerText: Community-owned journalism · Upvote the stories that matter · No login needed · We tally votes every week · Vote at blkoutuk.com/news
